attributes.action: Petition for Greater Food Choice and Clear Labeling for Consumers in England.
attributes.additional_details:
Petition for Greater Food Choice and Clear Labeling for Consumers in England

We, the undersigned, call for clearer labeling of halal meat products and greater availability of non-halal food choices across England.

As Christians and consumers with different beliefs and dietary preferences, we believe people should have the freedom to choose food that aligns with their personal convictions and traditions.

In many areas, halal meat is becoming more common in restaurants, takeaways, schools,
attributes.background:
Clear labeling of halal and non-halal meat products.
Greater transparency from businesses and public.
Fair availability of both halal and non-halal options wherever possible.
This petition supports freedom of choice, transparency, and mutual respect between all communities in England.

rejection.details:
We're not exactly sure what you mean by "Fair availability of both halal and non-halal options wherever possible." You may wish to sign this petition about labelling: 

'Require meat to be labelled if religiously slaughtered & stunned or not stunned'
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/765849
